parchment.$description: Parchment — Page background, primary canvas — warm cream that softens contrast and makes ink feel printed rather than digital

bone.$description: Bone — Card surfaces and elevated containers — one step darker than canvas, creates paper-on-paper layering without borders

linen.$description: Linen — Light neutral action fill for buttons on dark surfaces.

stone.$description: Stone — Hairline borders, dividers, subtle separators — warm-tinted 1px rules

mist.$description: Mist — Tertiary helper text, captions — between muted and secondary

driftwood.$description: Driftwood — Secondary body text, table content — quieter than primary ink

ash.$description: Ash — Icon fills, tertiary body text, subdued UI labels — the workhorse muted tone

ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, primary action button background, nav text — warm-tinted near-black, never pure #000

ember.$description: Ember — Orange text accent for links, tags, and emphasized short phrases. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

amber.$description: Amber — Warm action button fill (Build, Continue) and accent icon strokes — earthy companion to ember, used in product UI chrome

forest.$description: Forest — Green action color for filled buttons, selected navigation states, and focused conversion moments. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

verdant.$description: Verdant — Green text accent for links, tags, and emphasized short phrases. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

crimson.$description: Crimson — Red text accent for links, tags, and emphasized short phrases. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

cursorgothic.$description: Primary typeface for UI, headings, navigation, body, and product surfaces. Weight 400 headlines with progressively tighter letter-spacing (-0.005em at 22px → -0.03em at 72px) is the signature — headlines never bold. Font features ss08, ss09, tnum activate stylistic alternates and tabular numerals.

eb-garamond.$description: Editorial serif for select subheadings, prose body, and table data — adds literary texture against the CursorGothic UI shell

berkeleymono.$description: Monospace for code blocks, CLI snippets, metadata tags, file paths, and developer-facing labels — the technical voice

system-ui.$description: Secondary system text for small meta labels and supplementary UI where a custom font is overkill

lato.$description: Lato — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

apple-system.$description: -apple-system — detected in extracted data but not described by AI
